notes: version 1.0.6 (2026-06-27): un-held. The OTA-download crash (v1.0.1/1.0.3-era in-task OOM and stack overflow) is fixed since v1.0.4 (boot-time download with full ~136K heap, per-version fail-counter, app-rollback, no reboot on failure) and verified end-to-end on hardware. All field devices are USB-flashed at 1.0.6 and carry the fixed OTA path, so an equal version is a no-op; this arms the channel so a future strictly-newer release auto-deploys via the boot check and the daily 00:00 poll. Only publish versions reachable by the v1.0.4+ OTA path; pre-1.0.4 devices must be USB-reflashed.
